name: menu-button
description: A button that opens a menu rather than acting immediately. Its own role/state contract is small; Escape and arrow-key behavior inside the open menu come from the Menu and Menubar pattern the source page defers to.

requires.roles.haspopup: aria-haspopup set to menu or true
requires.roles.expanded: aria-expanded set to true while the menu is open, false while closed
requires.keyboard.Enter: opens the menu and moves focus to its first item
requires.keyboard.Space: opens the menu and moves focus to its first item
requires.keyboard.Escape: closes the menu and returns focus to the button
